baseline.anonymized_text: [PER_OXE] is an American [PER_BZP] noted for his portraits of other artists and photographers. [PER_EPX] was born in [LOC_VZO], [LOC_XQZ] in 1942. Son of photographer [PER_YBP] and namesake of [PER_BZP] [PER_UIH], he was exposed to art photography at an early age as his father's friends included [PER_UIH], [PER_ZGT] and [PER_CNV]. [PER_EPX] studied art at [ORG_WSO], [ORG_TVA], [ORG_VSY] and [ORG_IEH] where he received his Master of Fine Arts Degree studying with [PER_YTH], [PER_KGI], [PER_SMB] and [PER_FCS]. [ORG_VFA] was the first medium that gained [PER_SBK] high visibility in the [ORG_MEO]. [PER_EPX] took up photography in 1962 when he asked his [PER_SFZ] to teach him. After finishing graduate work and teaching fine art media at several colleges, [PER_EPX] was asked to teach at his [PER_SFZ]'s [ORG_HXW] in [LOC_VZO]. The series of artist portraits which now number over 250 were begun in 1979. Since 1963 [PER_EPX] has been involved in many solo and group exhibitions including; [ORG_KPN], and [ORG_NMZ]. His work is represented in many public, private and corporate collections including; [ORG_KPN], [ORG_TVA], and [ORG_AZP], [LOC_FLX], [LOC_ARW]. Today, [PER_EPX] lives in [LOC_VZO], [LOC_LNK] with his wife [PER_OIQ]. [PER_OXP] exhibits at [LOC_FZB], teaches photography at [ORG_EFI], and has published several books including a book of portraits of [LOC_LNK] artists entitled, Art in Residence: West Coast Artists in Their Space (see illustration). The book includes portraits of 74 artists, including [PER_ZGT], [PER_VQQ], [PER_EBC], [PER_DJG], and [PER_BKJ]. Other artist portraits made by [PER_EPX] include [PER_VYP], [PER_VQO], [PER_YVS], [PER_QVZ] and [PER_KEO]. [PER_EPX] is represented by [ORG_EHD] in [LOC_RRI] and [ORG_GAM] in [LOC_ALY].
